productDisplayName: Giordano Men Cream & Yellow Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analogue watch with stainless steel round caseDial style: Light yellow and cream dial with textured patterns and rose gold accents, white and rose gold hands, circular display of minute markings on the dial and branding on the 12 hour markFeatures: Three chronograph displays and screws to reset timeStrap style: Stainless steel bracelet strap with rose gold accents and single press fold over closureWater resistance: Up to 30 mWarranty: 2 years international warrantyWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
